title: Not one woman: Justice Ujjal Bhuyan on diversity record of Supreme Court appointments during former CJI DY Chandrachud’s tenure
description: Supreme Court Justice Ujjal Bhuyan on Saturday questioned the gender diversity record of judges' appointments made to the top court during the tenure of former Chief Justice of India (CJI) DY Chandrachud. He pointed out that none of the fourteen judges appointed during that period were women.“During the tenure of the CJI when I made it to this Court, fourteen appointments were made to the Supreme Court. None were women,” Justice Bhuyan said.Justice Bhuyan made the remarks during Session III of t
